conceptualization.theme_description: Outline the bright lights and dark shadows of city life after sunset.
conceptualization.technique: Abstract Watercolor Painting with No Outlines

visual_elements.composition: The painting will use a fluid, blended approach, with colors flowing into one another to create a dynamic, immersive cityscape at night. The focus will be on conveying the pulsating energy and the contrasting tranquility of the night through varied use of watercolor intensity and saturation.
visual_elements.textures: Salt and alcohol may be used to create interesting textures and effects that mimic the flickering city lights and reflective wet surfaces common in urban night scenes.

key_features.city_lights: Represented by sporadic splashes of neon hues against darker backgrounds, suggesting the irregular patterns of lights in city buildings, streetlamps, and billboards.
key_features.shadows: Darker tones and washes in indigo and charcoal will form the deep shadows cast by buildings and alleyways, offering a sense of depth and mystery.
key_features.skyline: Suggested rather than detailed, using uneven and soft silhouetted washes that hint at the jagged profiles of skyscrapers and rooftops.
key_features.reflection: Watercolor blending techniques will suggest wet streets reflecting city lights, achieved by mirroring colors on the wet surface below the city lights.

conceptualization.intended_emotion: The painting seeks to evoke a feeling of awe mixed with an undercurrent of contemplative solitude, embodying the isolation one can feel in the vast, bustling environment of the night-time city.
